title: Token-opt: cache-discipline audit — byte-stable static prefixes across all lanes/phases; cache-breakers (run-id, cycle, timestamps, dynamic tool lists) after the stable prefix
summary: Audit every phase prompt assembly + injected preamble for per-cycle dynamic content above the cache boundary; extend the existing cache-stable-prefix work (StaticPrefix/BaseCycleContext) to ALL injection sites; add an ACS/audit check that fails when a dynamic value appears above the boundary. Published: 41-80% cost cut; cache reads ITPM-exempt = ~5x effective quota at 80% hit. GATED: defer until token-telemetry-s7 ships (measured baseline re-ranks these by actual top consumers). Research: knowledge-base/research/token-concurrency-2026/ (papers.md 2.5-2.7).
acceptance: No per-cycle dynamic bytes above the cycle-context boundary in any composed prompt (regression check)
